title: Simple DenWY's phone
description: Mod that adds a simple phone
body:
### **Description**
A very simple mod that adds a phone _without any functionality_ (only ON/OFF). It is well suited for mini-series in Minecraft or RP, when a simple phone model is needed

### **Images**
![Phone ON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207586408a40cc533f800995fb032c50972d8aba.png)

![Phone OFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53861c7923f74d2ccbbe0eb8475202becee7bfa.png)
